data.title: Chainlink (LINK) price falls 35% from September high to $10M reserves, indicating potential downtrend ahead.
data.description: The value of Chainlink has experienced a significant 35% decline from its highest point in September, as indicated by CoinMarketCap. Even though reserves are increasing, technical analysis predicts additional drops in price.

data.title: Cushman & Wakefield appoints Walid Cheaib as Vice Chair to Canadian Capital Markets Team.
data.description: In Toronto today, Cushman & Wakefield, a prominent real estate services company, revealed the appointment of Walid Cheaib as Vice Chair.

data.title: FIBRA Macquarie México's Q3 2025 highlights include 80% tenant retention rates, US$59.3M NOI, US$63.6M rental income, and sale of 180k sq ft property in Chihuahua.
data.description: FIBRA Macquarie México (FIBRAMQ) released its financial and operational outcomes for the third quarter ending on September 30, 2025. In the third quarter of 2025, key highlights included robust tenant retention rates of around 80.0% within both the industrial and retail sectors. There was a notable quarterly Net Operating Income (NOI) of US$59.3 million, marking a 4.5% increase Year-over-Year (YoY), propelled by a record rental income of US$63.6 million, up by 8.1% YoY. Moreover, a notable asset recycling activity was undertaken, involving the sale of a 180 thousand square feet vacant property in Chihuahua.

data.title: Federal Home Loan Bank of Boston reports $66.0 million net income for 2025 third quarter and declares dividend. Form 10-Q to be filed soon.
data.description: In Boston on October 24, 2025, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Boston released its initial, unaudited financial results for the third quarter of 2025. The report revealed a net income of $66.0 million for the quarter. The bank anticipates submitting its official quarterly report on Form 10-Q for the same period soon.

data.title: Dow hits new high after surprise CPI data, Ford leads S&P 500 with jumps. Solar company shines post-earnings.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a significant rally following the release of unexpected CPI inflation data. Ford saw a notable jump, leading the S&P 500 performance. The Dow reached a new high fueled by this surprising data. Additionally, a solar company showed strong performance after its earnings report, contributing to the overall positive atmosphere in the market. This information was covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: 212NYC club's 11th Gala in NY celebrates industry leaders with theme "Resilience Through Reinvention."
data.description: The 11th Annual Gala of 212NYC New York's Digital Advertising Club took place on October 23 with the theme "Resilience Through Reinvention." The event celebrated vision, leadership, and resilience. The Gala awarded trailblazers in the industry for their outstanding contributions. This year's event marked another successful gathering, showcasing the commitment and innovation of the digital advertising community.

data.title: M&T Bank Corp (NYSE: MTB) to present at BancAnalysts Assoc of Boston Conference on Nov 6.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, M&T Bank Corporation, trading under the ticker symbol MTB on the New York Stock Exchange, announced its participation in the upcoming BancAnalysts Association of Boston Conference in Boston, MA. Representatives from M&T will be giving a presentation to investors and analysts on November 6.

data.title: National Press Club introduces $5,000 Rich Passan Sports Writing Scholarship for college students excelling in sports journalism.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, in Washington, the National Press Club introduced the Rich Passan Sports Writing Scholarship. This scholarship offers $5,000 annually to undergraduate students exhibiting talent and excellence in sports journalism. The scholarship aims to support budding journalists in the field. Additionally, this scholarship includes an opportunity for students to learn from experts in the field, like ESPN MLB insider.

data.title: Sampled and AutoGen partner to expand access to nucleic acid extraction for multiomic workflows in NJ, Oct 14, 2025.
data.description: PISCATAWAY, New Jersey - On October 14, 2025, Sampled, an analytical laboratory and biorepository providing comprehensive sample processing and multiomic analysis services, revealed a new collaboration with AutoGen. This partnership aims to broaden availability of specialized nucleic acid extraction services.

data.title: Guilford County Schools introduces 10 propane school buses for Dudley High School, focusing on sustainability and cost-effectiveness.
data.description: In North Carolina, Dudley High School students in Guilford County Schools district are set to utilize 10 new Blue Bird Vision Propane school buses. These buses, revealed at a recent ribbon-cutting event, will operate on cost-effective and environmentally friendly propane autogas. The district, which consists of 27 high schools, aims to promote sustainability and efficiency in transportation. "Guilford County Schools is at the forefront of introducing sustainable and economical transportation solutions to our community," stated Faye Crowder-Phillips, the district's executive.

data.title: 41st Imagine Benefit raised $1.3M to support Alzheimer’s Association. Peter Thomas Roth honored. Captivating performance by Christophe Fox.
data.description: Peter Thomas Roth was recognized for his enduring dedication at an event, featuring a mesmerizing act by mentalist and magician Christophe Fox. A touching moment was shared by Rachel Chavkin and Jacob Heinrichs during the event. The Alzheimer's Association was highlighted, with images available via Yvonne Tnt/BFA.com.

data.title: Inventor from Tukwila, Wash. creates UMBRELLA SLEEVE for easy transport; simplifies umbrella storage.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on October 24, 2025, an inventor from Tukwila, Washington, shared the inspiration behind the creation of the UMBRELLA SLEEVE. The inventor recognized the need for a convenient and hands-free method to store and carry umbrellas when not in use. This innovative sleeve design guarantees easy access to the umbrella, making it prepared for immediate use. The practicality of the UMBRELLA SLEEVE aims to simplify the process of transporting umbrellas, providing a solution that enhances convenience for users.

data.title: Altimetrik acquires SLK Software, forming a strong digital engineering company. SLK to operate as "SLK, an Altimetrik company".
data.description: Altimetrik has finalized its acquisition of SLK Software, solidifying its position as a digital engineering leader. The successful completion of the deal signifies a significant step in Altimetrik's journey. Post-acquisition, SLK Software will be known as "SLK, an Altimetrik company." This collaboration merges Altimetrik’s advanced AI and data-driven innovation expertise with SLK’s proficiency in Intelligent Enterprise and Digital Operations. This move aims to leverage the strengths of both entities, enhancing their combined capabilities in the digital engineering space.

data.title: Dr. Jonathan M. Magid offers patients the Hybrid Choice™ Concierge Program for enhanced care, service, and connectivity.
data.description: Internal medicine physician Jonathan M. Magid, M.D., based at the Medical Clinic of Houston, is offering patients the opportunity for extended time, personalized service, and exclusive one-to-one communication. This unique approach is provided by Concierge Choice Physicians (CCP), the foremost provider in the nation. Established on October 24, 2025, in Rockville Centre, New York, this service ensures patients receive dedicated care and attention from Dr. Magid, enhancing their overall experience.

data.title: Over 2,700 Zionists from 20 countries attend Jewish National Fund-USA Global Conference in Hollywood, promoting unity and hope.
data.description: In Hollywood, Florida on October 24, 2025, over 2,700 individuals who support the Zionist movement from 20 different countries came together for the inaugural session of the Jewish National Fund-USA's Global Conference for Israel. This event served as a significant commemoration of resilience, gratitude, and the sense of community among Jewish supporters. Known as The Magic, it highlighted the unity and strength of the Zionist community on a global scale.
